title: [SV][PrettifyVerilog] Lowered struct inject/array concat to `sv.passign` of individual fields/elements

features.name: register assigned via struct concatenation expression
features.description: Code should include a register with struct type being assigned a struct concatenation expression with multiple field values

features.name: register assigned via individual struct field updates
features.description: Code should include a register with struct type being assigned through individual field access using dot notation in separate assignment statements

features.name: struct field inout access for partial assignment
features.description: Code should include sequential logic where a struct field is accessed via inout reference and assigned a partial value
